title: Module 2: Layouts & Data
description: Ab hum seekhenge ki cheezon ko sahi jagah par kaise rakhein aur data kaise dikhayein.

chapters.title: 1. Block vs Inline Elements
chapters.content:
HTML me do tarah ke elements hote hain:

  • Block Elements: Ye poori line lete hain. (Jaise <div>, <p>, <h1>). Inke bagal me koi nahi aa sakta.
  • Inline Elements: Ye sirf utni jagah lete hain jitni zaroorat hai. (Jaise <span>, <b>, <a>). Ye ek line me chipak kar aa sakte hain.

chapters.title: 2. Lists & Tables (Data)
chapters.content:
Jab humein bohot saara data dikhana ho, to hum Lists ya Tables use karte hain.

Lists:

Point-wise data ke liye.

  • UL (Unordered): Bullet points.
  • OL (Ordered): Numbering (1, 2, 3).

Tables:

Excel jaisa data (Rows aur Columns) dikhane ke liye <table> use hota hai.

chapters.title: 3. Flexbox (Layout Ka Jadugar)
chapters.content:
Pehle elements ko bagal-bagal me lana bohot mushkil tha. Phir aaya Flexbox.

Bas parent ko bolo display: flex; aur saare bacche (children) ek line me aa jayenge.

Pro Tip: Flexbox sirf 1D layout (ek line) ke liye best hai. Complex grids ke liye hum aage Grid seekhenge.
